title: selaginella laxisporophylla
intro: Selaginella laxisporophylla is a species of plant in the genus Selaginella, which is a group of small to medium-sized, herbaceous or semi-woody plants commonly known as spikemoss or resurrection fern. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. The herbal preparations of Selaginella laxisporophylla include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
